# Sumba Hills

> Exclusive beachfront plots by Lawang in Sumba, Indonesia, from €29,900. Coming soon — this page collects interest from prospective buyers (email).

## Key facts
- Developer: Lawang (see https://lawangproperties.com)
- Location: Sumba, Indonesia — beachfront plots facing an untouched ocean
- Starting price: €29,900
- Status: coming soon, reservations not yet open
- Contact: sumbahills@lawangproperties.com · +62 811-3820-0932
- Register interest: https://sumbahills.lawangproperties.com/
